verdict: Vaseline Lip Therapy Rosy Lips is the standout in this lineup with a balanced blend of occlusive petrolatum, nourishing lanolin, and soothing aloe vera. It delivers reliable moisture without irritating actives, backed by strong review volume.

_research.name: Vaseline Lip Therapy Rosy Lips
pros: Best ingredient balance for daily use
_research.con: Rose pigment is cosmetic only and doesn't provide additional skincare benefits.
